description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2 Docker image and two stages: merge and deploy. Add a merge job that runs in the merge stage on all branches except master, executes apt-get update and apt-get install sshpass in before_script, then runs bundle install and bundle exec jekyll build. Add a deploy job that runs in the deploy stage only on the master branch, also runs apt-get update and apt-get install sshpass, then runs bundle install, bundle exec jekyll build, and finally uses sshpass -p "$PASS" scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -r $LOCALDIR $USER@$SERVER:$REMOTEDIR to copy the built site to a remote server. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
